official_registry_url.description: Optional override URL/path for the official template index. Empty uses the bundled templates/index.json baseline.

sqlite_file.description: SQLite file path when backend=sqlite. Empty uses plugin data dir/sharelife_state.sqlite3

migrate_from_json.description: When backend=sqlite, import legacy json state files into sqlite if key is missing

feature_flags.description: Feature flags for future enterprise capability

signing_key_id.description: Default signing key id used when exporting signed profile packs

signing_secret.description: HMAC signing secret used to sign exported profile-pack manifests

trusted_signing_keys.description: Trusted signing key map for import verification, format: {"key_id": "secret"}

secrets_encryption_key.description: Encryption key used by include_encrypted_secrets mode for export/import

plugin_install.description: Controlled plugin-install execution settings for imported extension/profile packs

enabled.description: Allow admin to execute plugin install commands from profile-pack metadata

command_timeout_seconds.description: Command timeout for each plugin install execution attempt

allowed_command_prefixes.description: Comma-separated command prefix allowlist for plugin install execution

allow_http_source.description: Allow plugin sources using plain http:// (not recommended)

require_success_before_apply.description: When true, plugin section apply requires successful install execution evidence

allow_origins.description: Comma-separated allowed origins for CORS. Empty uses secure defaults.

security_headers.description: Standalone WebUI HTTP security response headers

enabled.description: Enable default security headers on all WebUI responses

Content-Security-Policy.default: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; form-action 'self'

auth.description: Optional role-scoped password auth for standalone WebUI

password.description: Legacy shared password fallback for member only. It does not enable admin access. Prefer member_password/admin_password.

member_password.description: When non-empty, member WebUI login is enabled

admin_password.description: When non-empty, admin WebUI login is enabled. Must be at least 12 characters and contain no whitespace, otherwise auth stays fail-closed and admin login remains unavailable.

reviewer_password.description: When non-empty, reviewer WebUI login is enabled

token_ttl_seconds.description: Token TTL in seconds for role login sessions

reviewer_token_ttl_seconds.description: Reviewer login session TTL in seconds (default 7 days)

allow_query_token.description: Allow token in query string for legacy clients (not recommended)

login_rate_limit_max_attempts.description: Maximum failed login attempts within window

api_rate_limit_max_requests.description: Maximum API requests allowed per client/role/path within the window

observability.description: Standalone WebUI metrics and observability guardrails

metrics_max_paths.description: Maximum number of unique path labels tracked in Prometheus metrics before overflow collapse

metrics_overflow_path_label.description: Fallback path label used when unique path tracking exceeds metrics_max_paths

security_alert_window_seconds.description: Observation window in seconds for sensitive-route anomaly aggregation

security_alert_threshold.description: Default occurrence threshold before invalid credential anomalies notify admin

security_alert_cooldown_seconds.description: Cooldown in seconds before repeating the same sensitive-route anomaly notification

device_keys.description: Reviewer device key limits and verification settings

max_reviewer_devices.description: Maximum number of allowed device keys per reviewer account
